name: @ha-tv-pip/website
description: Promotional website for HA TV PiP.

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && vite build && node scripts/create-locale-routes.mjs
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.lint: eslint eslint.config.js vite.config.ts scripts src && node scripts/check-eslint-rules.mjs
